mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews (pra_id, overall_comment, total_score, status, submitted_at) VALUES (#{praId}, #{overallComment}, #{totalScore}, #{status}, NOW())
INSERT INTO review_scores (review_id, rubric_item_id, score, comment) VALUES (#{reviewId}, #{rubricItemId}, #{score}, #{comment})
mapper.update: UPDATE reviews SET total_score = #{totalScore} WHERE review_id = #{reviewId}
UPDATE reviews SET status = 'submitted', submitted_at = NOW() WHERE review_id = #{reviewId}
mapper.select: SELECT rs.rubric_item_id AS rubricItemId, ri.item_name AS itemName, rs.score, rs.comment, ri.max_score AS maxScore FROM review_scores rs JOIN rubric_items ri ON rs.rubric_item_id = ri.item_id WHERE rs.review_id = #{reviewId} ORDER BY ri.sort_order
